name: pure_sequential_scan
description: One-pass scan with no reuse (0..11). Any policy should fault on every access.

name: twolist_beats_lru_custom
description: A persistent hot page (0) is revisited after a brief disturbance; TwoList keeps it in active and saves one fault.

name: twolist_cost_custom
description: TwoList promotion/demotion overhead can misclassify recency and pay one extra fault versus LRU.
